welcome.title: Welcome to Mage Knight!
welcome.desc: Embark on an epic conquest across the Atlantean lands. This guide will teach you everything you need to play.

overview.title: How the Game Works
overview.desc: The game plays over 3 rounds (Day → Night → Day). Each round, you and a dummy player take turns. Play cards to move, fight, and interact with the world.

tactics.title: Tactic Selection
tactics.desc: At the start of each round, choose a tactic card. The number determines turn order — lower goes first. Each tactic also gives a special bonus.

cards.title: Your Hand of Cards
cards.desc: Cards at the bottom are your hand. Each card has a basic effect (free) and a stronger effect (costs mana). Wounds clog your hand — heal them by resting!

cardPlay.title: Playing Cards
cardPlay.desc: Tap a card to select it, then tap Play. Cards provide movement points, attack power, block value, influence, or healing. Sideways play gives +1 of any type.

movement.title: Moving on the Map
movement.desc: Click a hex to select your destination. Green hexes are reachable with your movement points. Moving reveals new map tiles and may uncover enemies!

terrain.title: Terrain & Costs
terrain.desc: Plains cost 2 MP, forests 3 (2 at night), hills 3, swamps 5 (3 at night), deserts 5 (3 at night). Roads and safe paths reduce costs.

sites.title: Sites & Interaction
sites.desc: Villages offer healing and basic cards. Monasteries offer advanced actions. Keeps let you recruit units. Mage Towers offer spells. Cities are the ultimate conquest!

combat.title: Combat System
combat.desc: Combat flows in 4 phases: ① Ranged/Siege attacks, ② Block enemy attacks, ③ Assign unblocked damage, ④ Melee attacks. Defeat enemies to earn fame!

mana.title: Mana & Crystals
mana.desc: Mana dice in the source power up your cards. Take one die per turn. Crystals are permanent mana — spend them anytime. Gold mana is wild during day, black at night.

levelUp.title: Leveling Up
levelUp.desc: Earn fame by defeating enemies and conquering sites. At level thresholds, you gain better armor, more card slots, and new unit capacity. Choose new skills or advanced cards!

goal.title: Your Goal
goal.desc: Explore the map, defeat enemies, and conquer a city! After 3 rounds, your score is calculated from fame, conquered sites, achievements, and more. Good luck, Mage Knight!

tipTactic.title: Choose Your Tactic
tipTactic.desc: Pick a tactic card. Lower numbers go first but higher numbers have better bonuses.

tipTurn.title: Your Turn
tipTurn.desc: Play cards to move, fight, or interact. Press End Turn when you're done, or Rest to heal wounds.

tipMove.title: Movement
tipMove.desc: Click a highlighted hex to move there. Each terrain type costs different movement points.

tipCombat.title: Entering Combat!
tipCombat.desc: Combat has 4 phases: Ranged → Block → Damage → Melee. Use cards and units for attacks and defense.

tipDamage.title: Assign Damage
tipDamage.desc: Use + buttons to assign unblocked damage to your hero or units. Each unassigned point becomes a wound card!

tipLevelUp.title: Level Up!
tipLevelUp.desc: Congratulations! You gained a level. Your armor, hand limit, or unit slots have improved.

tipSite.title: Site Interaction
tipSite.desc: You're at a site! You can recruit units, buy cards, learn spells, or heal depending on the location.

tipEndTurn.title: Turn Complete
tipEndTurn.desc: Played cards go to your discard pile. They'll return when the deck reshuffles at round end.

ch1.title: First Steps
ch1.desc: Learn the basics: play cards, move your hero, and fight your first enemy.

ch2.title: Terrain & Exploration
ch2.desc: Discover terrain costs, day and night cycles, mana sources, and map exploration.

ch3.title: Mana & Card Mastery
ch3.desc: Master the mana system, crystal management, spells, artifacts, and wound recovery.

ch4.title: Interaction & Units
ch4.desc: Visit sites, recruit units, heal at villages, and manage your reputation.

ch5.title: Advanced Combat
ch5.desc: Face tougher enemies with elemental resistances, fortifications, and special abilities.

ch6.title: City Assault & Mastery
ch6.desc: Conquer cities, level up your hero, gain skills, and learn the scoring system.

tutorialChapterSelect.title: Tutorial Chapters
tutorialChapterSelect.subtitle: Learn Mage Knight step by step, or jump to any chapter.
tutorialChapterSelect.allComplete: You've completed all chapters! You're ready for a real game.

welcome.title: Learn by Playing!
welcome.desc: This tutorial will guide you through actual gameplay. Follow the instructions and perform each action yourself.

handIntro.title: Your Cards
handIntro.desc: These cards at the bottom are your hand. Each card can be used for movement, attack, block, or other actions. Let's play one!

playCard.title: Play a Card
playCard.desc: Tap any card to select it, then press the 'Play' button. This will give you movement points.

movementIntro.title: Move Your Hero
movementIntro.desc: Now click a green highlighted hex on the map to select your destination.

confirmMove.title: Confirm Movement
confirmMove.desc: Press 'Confirm Move' to move your hero to the selected hex.

enemySpotted.title: Enemy Nearby!
enemySpotted.desc: There's an enemy on an adjacent hex. Press the 'Fight' button to engage in combat!

combatRanged.title: Ranged Phase
combatRanged.desc: This is the ranged attack phase. You can skip it for now — press 'Confirm Ranged Attacks'.

combatBlock.title: Block Phase
combatBlock.desc: The enemy attacks! You can block with cards or units. For now, press 'Confirm Blocks' to continue.

combatDamage.title: Assign Damage
combatDamage.desc: Unblocked damage must be assigned. Press '+' next to your hero to absorb the damage, then 'Confirm'.

combatMelee.title: Melee Attack
combatMelee.desc: Now fight back! Press 'Confirm Melee Attacks' to strike the enemy.

combatEnd.title: Victory!
combatEnd.desc: You defeated the enemy and earned fame! Press 'End Combat' to continue.

endTurn.title: End Your Turn
endTurn.desc: Press 'End Turn' in the top bar to finish your turn.

complete.title: Tutorial Complete!
complete.desc: Excellent! You've learned the basics of movement, card play, and combat. You're ready to play a real game!

welcome.title: Welcome, Mage Knight!
welcome.desc: This hands-on tutorial walks you through your first turn. You'll play cards, move across the map, and fight an enemy.

handOverview.title: Your Hand
handOverview.desc: These cards along the bottom are your hand. Each one provides movement, attack, block, or other abilities. You'll play them to take actions.

playCard.title: Play a Card
playCard.desc: Tap a card to select it, then press 'Play'. This card will give you movement points so you can travel across the map.

movementPoints.title: Movement Points
movementPoints.desc: You now have movement points shown on the action bar. Each terrain type costs a different number of points to enter. In a turn you first finish all your movement, then take a single action such as combat. Once you start a fight you cannot move again this turn, so move first.

selectHex.title: Choose a Hex
selectHex.desc: Click on a green highlighted hex to set your destination. Green means you have enough points to reach it.

confirmMove.title: Confirm Move
confirmMove.desc: Press 'Confirm Move' to send your hero to the selected hex. Watch your movement points decrease as you travel.

moveToHex.title: Move Your Hero
moveToHex.desc: Click a hex on the map to select your destination, then confirm the move. Green markers show hexes you can reach.

terrainIntro.title: Terrain Costs
terrainIntro.desc: Different terrains cost different movement points. Plains cost 2, forests 3, hills 3, and swamps or deserts cost 5. Roads reduce costs to 1.

enemySpotted.title: Enemy Ahead!
enemySpotted.desc: An enemy guards a nearby hex. Press the 'Fight' button to engage it in combat. Defeating enemies earns you fame points. Combat is your turn's action — once it starts you cannot move again this turn, so finish any movement first.

combatRanged.title: Ranged Phase
combatRanged.desc: Combat starts with ranged attacks. You can play ranged attack cards here, or skip this phase by pressing 'Confirm Ranged Attacks'.

combatBlock.title: Block Phase
combatBlock.desc: The enemy strikes back! Play block cards to reduce incoming damage. Press 'Confirm Blocks' when you're done blocking.

combatDamage.title: Assign Damage
combatDamage.desc: Any unblocked damage must go somewhere. Assign it to your hero or units using the '+' buttons, then press 'Confirm'. Unassigned damage becomes wound cards.

combatMelee.title: Melee Phase
combatMelee.desc: Time to fight back! Play attack cards to deal melee damage, then press 'Confirm Melee Attacks' to finish the fight.

combatVictory.title: Victory!
combatVictory.desc: You defeated your first enemy! You've earned fame points. Press 'End Combat' to collect your reward and continue.

endTurn.title: End Your Turn
endTurn.desc: Press 'End Turn' in the top bar. Your played cards go to the discard pile. They'll return when the deck reshuffles.

complete.title: Chapter 1 Complete!
complete.desc: Great job! You've learned card play, movement, and the four combat phases. These are the building blocks for everything else.

welcome.title: Explore the World
welcome.desc: This chapter covers terrain types, day and night effects, the mana source, and how to reveal new map tiles.

terrainTypes.title: Terrain Types
terrainTypes.desc: The map has plains (2 MP), forests (3 MP), hills (3 MP), swamps (5 MP), and deserts (5 MP). Roads always cost just 1 MP. Plan your path carefully.

dayNight.title: Day & Night
dayNight.desc: The game alternates between day and night rounds. Some terrains cost less at night (forests, swamps, deserts). Enemies also behave differently after dark.

manaSource.title: The Mana Source
manaSource.desc: The colored dice in the top right are the mana source. These represent available mana that any player can tap into during their turn.

takeMana.title: Take a Mana Die
takeMana.desc: Click a die from the mana source to take it. You get one die per turn. This mana powers the strong effects on your cards.

strongEffect.title: Use Strong Effect
strongEffect.desc: Play a card and spend your mana to activate its strong effect. Strong effects are significantly more powerful than the basic version.

sidewaysPlay.title: Sideways Play
sidewaysPlay.desc: Any card can be played sideways for a generic +1 to movement, attack, block, or influence. It's a flexible way to squeeze extra value from your hand.

moveForest.title: Move Through Forest
moveForest.desc: Try moving into a forest hex. It costs 3 MP during the day, but only 2 MP at night. Notice how the terrain affects your route planning.

tileReveal.title: Reveal New Tiles
tileReveal.desc: Moving to the edge of explored territory reveals new map tiles. Exploration is key: new tiles bring enemies, sites, and treasures.

crystals.title: Crystals
crystals.desc: Crystals are permanent mana you can spend anytime, even on another player's turn. Unlike source dice, crystals don't get rerolled. Use them wisely.

endTurn.title: Finish the Turn
endTurn.desc: Press 'End Turn' to wrap up. You've covered a lot of ground this chapter, both literally and figuratively.

complete.title: Chapter 2 Complete!
complete.desc: You now understand terrain, day/night cycles, mana sources, and exploration. These systems shape every decision you'll make on the map.

welcome.title: Master Your Mana
welcome.desc: This chapter dives deep into mana colors, crystals, spells, artifacts, and how wounds affect your hand.

manaColors.title: Mana Colors
manaColors.desc: Mana comes in four colors: red (attack), blue (magic/cold), green (nature/movement), and white (spirit/healing). Match the color to your card's requirement.

goldMana.title: Gold & Black Mana
goldMana.desc: Gold mana acts as a wild card during the day, replacing any color. At night, black mana takes over as the wild type. Plan around these shifts.

crystalUsage.title: Spend a Crystal
crystalUsage.desc: Crystals sit in your inventory permanently. Spend one now to power a card's strong effect. Tap the crystal that matches the color your card needs.

powerSpell.title: Cast a Spell
powerSpell.desc: Spells require mana to cast even at basic level. Select a spell card from your hand and spend the required mana to unleash it.

wounds.title: Wound Cards
wounds.desc: When you take damage, wound cards enter your hand. They can't be played normally and clog up your options. Healing or resting removes them.

woundEffects.title: Wound Penalties
woundEffects.desc: A hand full of wounds limits what you can do. If your entire hand is wounds, you're forced to rest. Keep your hero healthy whenever possible.

artifactCards.title: Artifacts
artifactCards.desc: Artifacts are powerful one-time-use cards. They don't need mana and often provide game-changing effects. You'll find them as rewards or at certain sites.

cardSidewaysDetail.title: Sideways Mastery
cardSidewaysDetail.desc: Try playing a card sideways now. This gives +1 to any action type you choose. It's always an option when the card's printed effect doesn't fit your plan.

endTurn.title: Wrap Up
endTurn.desc: Press 'End Turn' to finish. You're building a strong foundation of mana knowledge that'll pay off in tougher encounters.

complete.title: Chapter 3 Complete!
complete.desc: You've mastered the mana system, crystals, spells, artifacts, and wound management. These tools will carry you through the hardest battles.

welcome.title: Sites & Allies
welcome.desc: Time to visit locations on the map, recruit units, heal your wounds, and build your reputation.

influence.title: Influence
influence.desc: Influence is your social currency. Use it to interact with villages, recruit units, and buy cards from sites. Some cards provide influence when played.

moveToVillage.title: Visit a Village
moveToVillage.desc: Move your hero to a village hex. Villages offer healing, let you recruit peasants, and sell basic action cards.

villageHealing.title: Heal at Village
villageHealing.desc: Spend influence to heal wound cards at the village. Each point of healing removes one wound from your hand. A clean hand means more options.

reputation.title: Reputation Track
reputation.desc: Your reputation affects interaction costs. High reputation means cheaper recruiting and healing. Burning villages or monasteries tanks your rep, so think twice.

monastery.title: Monasteries
monastery.desc: Monasteries offer advanced action cards that are stronger than your starting deck. Spend influence to add them to your arsenal.

mageTower.title: Mage Towers
mageTower.desc: Mage Towers sell spell cards. Spells cost mana to use, but their effects are uniquely powerful. They're worth the investment.

unitRecruit.title: Recruit a Unit
unitRecruit.desc: Units are allies that fight alongside you. Spend influence at keeps, villages, or mage towers to recruit them. They add attack, block, or special abilities.

unitActivation.title: Unit Activation
unitActivation.desc: Units can be activated once per combat. They provide attack or block values, and some have special abilities. Wounded units can't be activated until healed.

resting.title: Resting
resting.desc: Instead of playing cards, you can rest. Resting discards your entire hand (including wounds) and draws a fresh set. Sometimes it's the smartest move.

endTurn.title: Finish Up
endTurn.desc: End your turn. You've learned how to make the most of the sites scattered across the map.

complete.title: Chapter 4 Complete!
complete.desc: You can now interact with sites, recruit units, manage reputation, and heal your hero. These skills turn a solo warrior into an army commander.

welcome.title: Harder Battles
welcome.desc: Enemies get tougher as you push deeper into the map. This chapter teaches elemental resistances, special abilities, and advanced combat tactics.

elements.title: Element Types
elements.desc: Some enemies resist or are vulnerable to specific elements: fire (physical), ice (magical), or both. Match your attacks to exploit weaknesses.

enemyAbilities.title: Enemy Abilities
enemyAbilities.desc: Watch for keywords like Swift (attacks before blocking), Brutal (unblockable bonus damage), Poison (wounds can't be healed normally), and Paralyze.

fortified.title: Fortified Enemies
fortified.desc: Fortified enemies can only be damaged by siege attacks in the ranged phase. Regular ranged attacks bounce off their defenses.

engageCombat.title: Engage the Enemy
engageCombat.desc: Move adjacent to an enemy and press 'Fight'. Pay attention to the enemy's stats: attack value, armor, and any special abilities.

rangedAttack.title: Ranged Attacks
rangedAttack.desc: Use ranged attack cards during this phase. If the enemy is fortified, you'll need siege-type damage instead. Ranged units can also contribute here.

blockElements.title: Elemental Blocking
blockElements.desc: Fire attacks need fire block (or double physical block). Ice attacks need ice block (or double physical block). Regular blocks won't fully protect you.

damageSpecial.title: Special Damage
damageSpecial.desc: Assign damage carefully. Poison damage creates wounds that can't be healed at villages. Some enemies deal extra damage when unblocked.

meleeFinish.title: Finish the Fight
meleeFinish.desc: Deal enough melee damage to match or exceed the enemy's armor value. Combine cards, units, and mana to reach the threshold.

fameReward.title: Fame Reward
fameReward.desc: Tougher enemies give more fame. Fame determines your level and ultimately your final score. Seek out strong foes when you're ready.

endTurn.title: End Your Turn
endTurn.desc: Press 'End Turn' to close out this round. Each battle makes your hero stronger and better equipped for what lies ahead.

complete.title: Chapter 5 Complete!
complete.desc: You've tackled elements, enemy abilities, and fortified foes. The toughest challenges on the map are now within your reach.

welcome.title: The Final Challenge
welcome.desc: Cities are the ultimate test. This chapter covers city assault, garrison battles, round transitions, leveling up, and scoring.

cityOverview.title: City Basics
cityOverview.desc: Cities sit at the center of the map and are heavily defended. Conquering a city requires careful preparation and powerful cards.

cityColors.title: City Colors
cityColors.desc: Each city has a color that determines its garrison composition. Green cities are easiest, red and blue are moderate, white cities are the hardest.

garrison.title: City Garrison
garrison.desc: A city's garrison contains multiple enemies you must defeat in a single combat. You fight them all at once, so plan your resources carefully.

assaultPenalty.title: Assault Penalties
assaultPenalty.desc: Attacking a city imposes penalties. Enemies in the garrison get bonus armor and attack. Fortified enemies in cities require siege to even scratch them.

roundTransition.title: Round Transitions
roundTransition.desc: The game runs three rounds: Day, Night, then Day again. Between rounds, all cards reshuffle, mana rerolls, and you pick a new tactic. Plan across rounds.

levelUp.title: Leveling Up
levelUp.desc: Earning fame raises your level. Each level grants better armor, larger hand size, or extra unit slots. You also pick a new skill or advanced action card.

skills.title: Skills
skills.desc: Skills provide permanent passive bonuses or once-per-round abilities. They don't take hand space. Choose skills that complement your play style.

scoring.title: Final Scoring
scoring.desc: After three rounds, your score tallies fame earned, cities conquered, greatest knowledge, greatest army, and adventure bonuses. Every action counts.

complete.title: All Chapters Complete!
complete.desc: Congratulations! You've learned every major system in Mage Knight. Go conquer the Atlantean lands and claim your rightful glory.

game.tacticHint: Choose a tactic card for this round

phaseHint.movement: Play cards for move points, then select a hex to move to.
phaseHint.action_declaration: Choose your action: interact with a site, explore, challenge an enemy, rest, or end your turn.
phaseHint.interaction: Choose how to interact with this location.
phaseHint.combat_ranged_siege: Play ranged or siege attacks before the enemy reaches you.
phaseHint.combat_block: Assign block values to reduce incoming damage.
phaseHint.combat_assign_damage: Assign unblocked damage to your hero or units.
phaseHint.combat_attack: Play attack cards to defeat the enemy.
phaseHint.end_of_turn: Your turn is ending. Discard played cards and draw a new hand.
phaseHint.end_of_round: The round is ending. Prepare for the next round.

game.sidewaysHint: Use this card for a generic +1 bonus
game.rethinkSubtitle: Discard up to 3 cards (including wounds) from your hand, then draw that many.
game.preparationSubtitle: Search your deck for one card to take into your hand.
game.meditationSubtitle: Shuffle up to 5 cards (including wounds) from your hand back into your deck, then draw that many.
game.manaStealSelectSubtitle: Select 1 basic-color die from the Source.
game.manaSearchSelectSubtitle: Select up to 2 dice to reroll.
game.attachBannerSubtitle: Choose a unit to carry this banner. It keeps the bonus until the unit is disbanded.
game.coachActionBody: Fight enemies, interact at the current site, or end your turn.
game.coachCombatBody: Use the combat tray at the bottom, confirm each phase, then end combat.
game.coachInteractionBody: Play Influence cards, buy what you need, then end interaction.
game.coachNoMoveBody: No Move left. End turn or play more Move if you still have cards.
game.coachTacticBody: Pick one card to set initiative and begin the round.
game.coachTurnBody: Tap a card in your hand. Use a sideways movement play to travel, or Basic/Strong effects for actions.
game.courageReady: Banner of Courage: flip to ready this unit
game.improvisationChooseSubtitle: Select the effect you want to gain.
game.bloodSubtitle: Gain a Wound, pay a mana, and take a matching Advanced Action into your hand.
game.songWindSubtitle: Pay a blue mana to travel through lakes for Move cost 0 this turn?
game.peacefulSubtitle: Take the Influence, or spend it as Healing (2 Influence → Heal 1).
game.offeringSubtitle: Discard up to 3 non-Wound cards — gain a crystal of each card's colour.
game.improvisationDiscardSubtitle: Discard a card from your hand to activate the effect.
game.levelUpAABottom: You receive the bottom Advanced Action
game.levelUpNoSkills: Your skill deck is empty — you still gain an Advanced Action.
game.levelUpPickAA: Pick an Advanced Action from the offer
game.levelUpPickCommon: Pick a skill from the common pool
game.levelUpPickRevealed: Pick one of your revealed skills
game.rewardChooseType: The ancient ruins hold treasure. Choose your reward:
game.rewardCrystalBlack: Black: you gain 1 Fame instead of a crystal.
game.rewardCrystalGold: Gold: choose any basic color crystal!
game.rewardSpellPick: Choose a spell from the offer — it goes on top of your deed deck.
game.title: Game
game.coachMoveBody: Green hexes are reachable. Tap one, then Confirm Move. Remaining Move: {{remaining}}
game.rewardArtifactPick: Choose artifact(s) to keep — the rest return to the deck.
game.availableFight: An enemy is here or adjacent. Start a fight to earn Fame and clear the location.
game.availableInteract: This site can be used now. Play Influence, then interact to recruit, heal, or buy rewards.
game.standardRestSubtitle: Select 1 non-wound card (required) and any wounds to discard
game.standardRestRule: Discard exactly one non-Wound card (plus any number of Wounds).
game.comboTitle: Choose a card to play with it
game.comboSubtitle: Its strong effect resolves for free with +{{bonus}}.
game.levelUpNoCommonHint: B unlocks once a skill is in the Common pool — a Dummy (Norowas) skill is revealed there each time you gain a skill, so it becomes available from your next level-up.
game.levelUpPickCommonFrom: Pick a skill from the common pool ({{hero}})
game.levelUpNoCommonHintHero: B unlocks once a skill is in the Common pool — a {{hero}} skill is revealed there each time you gain a skill, so it becomes available from your next level-up.

combat.title: Combat
combat.rangedSiegeHint: Select enemies to target, then play cards to build attacks.
combat.meleeHint: Select enemies to target, then play cards to build attacks.
combat.noCardsPlayed: No cards played yet — use the card tray below.
combat.noAttacks: No attacks declared. Click an enemy above to start.
combat.blockDesc: Assign blocks to reduce enemy damage. Unblocked enemies deal full damage.
combat.noBlock: No block assigned — will take damage
combat.damageAssignHint: Units soak their Armor (one Wound); the rest hits your Hero.
combat.woundHelpBody: Armor sets how much damage equals one Wound. You take ⌈damage ÷ Armor⌉ Wounds (rounded up).
combat.woundHelpUnit: A Unit instead soaks up to its Armor and takes a single Wound; assign damage to a Unit to spare your Hero.
combat.comboSubtitle: Pick an Action card — its strong effect is played for free with the bonus added.
combat.comboNoTarget: No Action card with a usable strong effect this phase.
combat.retreatNote: Surviving enemies remain. No site rewards earned.
combat.rewardsNote: Rewards will be processed when combat ends.
combat.abilityFortifiedDesc: Cannot be targeted by Ranged Attacks — only Siege Attacks in the first combat phase.
combat.abilityPhysicalResistanceDesc: Physical attacks are halved. Use Fire/Ice/Cold Fire attacks for full effect.
combat.abilityFireResistanceDesc: Fire attacks are halved; effects requiring red mana have no effect on it.
combat.abilityIceResistanceDesc: Ice attacks are halved; effects requiring blue mana have no effect on it.
combat.abilitySwiftDesc: You need double the Block value to block this enemy.
combat.abilityBrutalDesc: If not blocked, it deals twice its Attack value as damage.
combat.abilityPoisonDesc: Each Wound it deals is doubled (one to hand, one to discard). Units take 2 Wounds.
combat.abilityParalyzeDesc: If it wounds your Hero, discard all non-Wound cards from hand. A wounded Unit is destroyed.
combat.abilityArcaneImmunityDesc: Immune to Spells and most special effects that target it.
combat.abilityCumbersomeDesc: After blocking, you may spend Move points up to its Attack to gain that much Block next time.
combat.abilityUnfortifiedDesc: Lost its fortification — can now be targeted by Ranged Attacks.
combat.abilityVampiricDesc: Heals itself; harder to wear down across the combat.
combat.abilityAssassinationDesc: Damage cannot be assigned to Units — your Hero must take it all.
combat.abilityDefend1Desc: Adds +1 Armor to fellow defenders at this site.
combat.abilityDefend2Desc: Adds +2 Armor to fellow defenders at this site.
combat.abilityRepMinus1Desc: Defeating or fighting it costs you 1 Reputation.
combat.unassignedBlockWarning: You played block cards but did not assign them to an enemy. Tap "Assign Block" on an enemy first — otherwise the cards are discarded with no defense and you take the damage.
combat.unassignedAttackWarning: You played attack cards but did not assign them to an enemy. Tap an enemy above first — otherwise the cards are discarded with no attack.

interaction.title: Site Interaction
interaction.noUnitsAvailable: No units available at this site
interaction.playCardsForInfluence: Play cards for influence, then purchase items.
interaction.disbandHint: disband a unit to make room:
interaction.plunderVillageHint: Plunder for supplies: draw 2 cards and lose 1 Reputation.

track.dieTaken: Already took a die this turn

ad.rewardHintPrompt: Watch a short video to see a hint?
ad.rewardRetryPrompt: Watch a short video to get a retry?

entryDesc.greatestKnowledge: Most Advanced Actions + Spells in deed deck
entryDesc.endurance: Did not declare end of round in final round

logmsg.forcedWithdrawal: Forced withdrawal! Retreated to a safe space and took 1 wound
logmsg.gladeHealHand: Magical Glade: threw away 1 wound from hand
logmsg.gladeHealDiscard: Magical Glade: threw away 1 wound from discard pile
logmsg.dummySkillRevealed: Dummy revealed {{name}} into the common pool
logmsg.aaOnDeck: Gained advanced action: {{name}} (on top of deed deck)
logmsg.crystalRollBlack: Crystal roll: black — gained 1 Fame instead
logmsg.aaLearnedMonastery: Learned {{name}} at the monastery for 6 influence

validation.spellStrongDay: Spell strong cannot be played during day (requires black mana which is unavailable)
validation.spellStrongNeedsColor: Spell strong requires {{color}} (or gold) mana at night
validation.actionStrongDayNeedsColor: Action strong requires {{color}} (or gold) mana during day
validation.actionStrongNightNeedsBoth: Action strong at night requires {{color}} (or gold) mana AND black mana
validation.actionStrongNightNeedsColor: Action strong at night requires {{color}} (or gold) mana
validation.actionStrongNightNeedsBlack: Action strong at night requires black mana
validation.spellStrongNightNeedsBoth: Spell strong at night requires {{color}} (or gold) mana AND black mana
validation.spellStrongNeedsBlack: Spell strong at night requires black mana

hero.selectSubtitle: Each hero has a unique starting card and skill set.
